name: Footballwars Online
author: Poki
description: Footballwars.online is an action-packed, multiplayer football IO game created by ERIGATOHISHIMA. Put on your football helmet and pads and get ready to get in the game. Footballwars.online combines the sportsmanship and grace of American football with the fun, chaotic feel of an IO game. Your goal is simple, get the ball to the end zone and score a touchdown! The team with the most points at the end of the game wins. Play Footballwars.online on Poki for free and show you have what it takes to be an NFL star! Controls: Mouse - Move About the creator: Footballwars.online is created by ERIGATOHISHIMA, based in Japan.
